record.sourceCode:
from decimal import Decimal, getcontext
getcontext().prec = 1000005
a = int(input())
b = int(input())
result_mul = a * b
print(f": {result_mul}")

problem.title: 【模板】高精度乘法 / A*B Problem 升级版
